title: Design Review - Therapeak v1.0 CE Marking Readiness
author: Sarp Derinsu

data.Feature/Change Description: Review of Therapeak software for CE marking readiness as Class IIa medical device.
data.Conditions/Actions: 1. Activate crisis protocol in conversation jobs before market entry. 2. Implement FLAG_CRISIS monitoring. 3. Complete usability evaluation with representative users. 4. Finalize medical device translations.
data.Notes: Software architecture and therapeutic approach reviewed. Risk management file completed with 15 hazards all at acceptable/ALARP. Clinical evidence supports safety and performance. Pre-market data from wellness version shows no safety concerns.
